posts.title: N3 Construction: Delays Expected Between Pinetown & Hillcrest
posts.excerpt: Road construction and lane closures on the N3 between Pinetown and Hillcrest causing significant delays during peak hours. Allow extra 20-30 minutes travel time or use alternate routes via Old Main Road. Our response teams are monitoring the area closely.

posts.title: Severe Pothole Hazard: Old Main Road, Kloof
posts.excerpt: Large pothole reported on Old Main Road near Kloof intersection causing vehicle damage. Multiple rim and tire damage incidents recorded. Drive carefully and report damage to municipality. We're on standby 24/7 if you need assistance: 073 745 3329.

posts.title: Heavy Rainfall Expected: Exercise Caution on KZN Roads
posts.excerpt: Weather forecast predicts heavy rainfall across KZN this weekend. Expect reduced visibility, slippery conditions, and potential flooding on low-lying roads. Reduce speed, increase following distance, and turn on headlights. Check tire tread depth before traveling.

posts.title: Field's Hill: One Lane Closed for Emergency Repairs
posts.excerpt: Emergency road repairs on Field's Hill following yesterday's heavy vehicle incident. One lane closed, traffic flowing slowly. Expect 15-minute delays during rush hours. Use M13 as alternate route. Situation expected to normalize by Friday evening.

posts.title: Fleet Expansion: Welcome Our 4th Flatbed Rollback!
posts.excerpt: We're excited to announce the arrival of our newest team member - a state-of-the-art flatbed rollback truck! This brings our flatbed fleet to 4 trucks, meaning even faster response times for Westville, Hillcrest, and surrounding areas. Advanced hydraulics and damage-free loading technology.

posts.title: Millaz Towing Achieves NATA Recertification for 2026
posts.excerpt: Proud to announce we've successfully renewed our National African Towing Association (NATA) certification for 2026! This recertification confirms our continued commitment to professional standards, customer service excellence, and industry best practices.

posts.title: Driver Recognition: Celebrating 5 Years with Thabo M.
posts.excerpt: Congratulations to Thabo M. on completing 5 years with Millaz Towing! Thabo has completed over 2,000 recoveries, trained 3 new drivers, and consistently receives top customer reviews.

posts.title: Extended Coverage: Now Serving Gillitts & Botha's Hill
posts.excerpt: Great news for motorists in the Upper Highway area! We've officially expanded our service coverage to include Gillitts, Botha's Hill, and surrounding areas. Same reliable 24/7 service, faster response times.

posts.title: Introducing Long-Distance Towing: KZN to Gauteng
posts.excerpt: We now offer long-distance towing services between KZN and Gauteng! Whether you're relocating, buying a vehicle, or need inter-provincial recovery, our flatbed trucks can safely transport your vehicle.

posts.title: Storage Facility Security Upgrade Complete
posts.excerpt: Our undercover vehicle storage facility has received a major security upgrade with enhanced CCTV recording, additional security personnel, and improved lighting.

posts.title: Proud Sponsor of Pinetown Youth FC U-15 Team
posts.excerpt: We're thrilled to announce our sponsorship of Pinetown Youth FC's U-15 team for the 2026 season. Supporting grassroots football and giving back to the community that supports us.

posts.title: Free Road Safety Workshop: Westville Community Centre
posts.excerpt: Join us for a free road safety workshop on Saturday, March 15th at Westville Community Centre! Topics include winter driving tips, accident response, and vehicle maintenance basics.

posts.title: Supporting Durban & Coast SPCA Vehicle Transport
posts.excerpt: Millaz Towing is proud to support the Durban & Coast SPCA with free emergency animal rescue transport services for injured or displaced animals on KZN roads.

posts.title: Rainy Season Vehicle Prep: 5 Essential Checks
posts.excerpt: With KZN's rainy season approaching, ensure your vehicle is ready. Check tire tread depth, wiper blades, brake pads, battery terminals, and headlight brightness.

posts.title: Every Vehicle Needs This Emergency Kit
posts.excerpt: Essential items every KZN motorist should carry: reflective triangle, high-vis vest, flashlight, jumper cables, basic tools, first aid kit, water, and emergency contacts.
